title: The Vault of Corroded Glass

features.name: the-mirror-becoming-itself
features.desc-on-touch: Glass corrupted past reflection. The underneath shows: rust, dust, time, the place where light was trapped before it could return.

features.name: the-fractured-reflection
features.desc-on-touch: Each crack shows a different version of what stood here. Multiplied, refracted, corrupted into plurality. No single image survives.

features.name: the-corrosion-reveals
features.desc-on-touch: Underneath the coating is older glass. Underneath that, even older. Each layer corroded to show the one beneath. Archives within archives.

features.name: the-vault-s-breath
features.desc-on-touch: The air in this chamber is aged glass dust. Breathing it, you taste every mirror that ever rusted here. The past is atmospheric.

features.name: the-unreflected-thing
features.desc-on-touch: Something stood here once. The mirrors are too corrupted now to show it. But the corruption itself—that is the truest image of what was.

features.name: the-chip-of-diagnostic-failure
features.desc-on-touch: A circuit board losing its connections. The diagnostics corrupted by what they were meant to observe. The render is becoming the thing it renders.

inscription: the older the mirror, the better it shows you what it cannot show

file.name: Diagnostic_Degradation_Accelerating.tmp
file.note: ERROR: The render is failing in ways that make it more accurate. Corrosion status: productive. Each layer of failure reveals a deeper truth. The vault preserves by corrupting.

exits.label: back out to mirrors that still try to reflect
toward even deeper vaults where mirrors become paint
upward to chambers where glass still holds integrity
downward to depths where reflection becomes obsolete
